column1: # roofline_data.csv — silicon-anchored data for Chapter 5 Roofline plot.
# Populated by 07_sw/cnn_eval/analyze_two_pass.py from UART logs of
# Pillar B1-B6 silicon runs. Until silicon lands
#   layer            — layer name in the MNIST topology
#   ai_mac_per_byte  — arithmetic intensity (MACs / DDR bytes moved)
#   peak_util_pct    — silicon_gops / 1600 MOPS × 100  (% of arch peak)
# === Compute roof (horizontal at 1.6 GOPS = 1 MAC = 2 ops × 800 MMAC/s) ===
# === Memory roofs (slope = BW; intersects compute roof at the knee) ===
